title: The Road to the Rooftop Opens
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Yamato, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Father and his men have set out on an expedition!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of the higher ranks are here at the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if it's not my responsibility to defend this island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With as much destruction you've caused, enough is enough!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll go on ahead to the main- land!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to return all these abducted kids back to their families!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thank you!! Thank you all so much!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I refuse to believe that someone as strong as you isn't even a captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm YAMATO!! I've been bored out of my mind, so I'll fight you, if you want!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 26 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
